messages.content: You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"schedule_training_session","description":"Schedule training.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"topic":{"type":"string"},"start_time":{"type":"string"},"duration_minutes":{"type":"integer"},"participants":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"required":{"type":"boolean"}},"required":["topic","start_time","duration_minutes","participants","required"]}}}]</tools>
Schedule required safety induction at 2026-06-30T09:00:00+10:00 for 90 minutes for alex@example.test and rui@example.test.

<tool_call>
{"name":"schedule_training_session","arguments":{"topic":"safety induction","start_time":"2026-06-30T09:00:00+10:00"}}
</tool_call>
That is incomplete. Re-issue with duration, both participants, and required true.

<tool_call>
{"name":"schedule_training_session","arguments":{"topic":"safety induction","start_time":"2026-06-30T09:00:00+10:00","duration_minutes":90,"participants":["alex@example.test","rui@example.test"],"required":true}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"rotate_api_key","description":"Rotate API key.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"service":{"type":"string"},"key_id":{"type":"string"},"notify_emails":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"grace_period_hours":{"type":"integer"}},"required":["service","key_id","notify_emails","grace_period_hours"]}}}]</tools>
Rotate API key KEY-18 for maps_service with 24 hour grace period and notify devops@example.test and owner@example.test.

<tool_call>
{"name":"rotate_api_key","arguments":{"service":"maps_service","key_id":"KEY-18","grace_period_hours":24}}
</tool_call>
You omitted notify_emails. Re-issue the complete corrected call only.

<tool_call>
{"name":"rotate_api_key","arguments":{"service":"maps_service","key_id":"KEY-18","notify_emails":["devops@example.test","owner@example.test"],"grace_period_hours":24}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"create_return_label","description":"Create return label.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"order_id":{"type":"string"},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"carrier":{"type":"string"},"insured_value_cents":{"type":"integer"}},"required":["order_id","items","carrier","insured_value_cents"]}}}]</tools>
Create a return label for order ORD-990 with items SKU-1 and SKU-8 using carrier AusPost and insured value 18900 cents.

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_return_label","arguments":{"order_id":"ORD-990","items":["SKU-1"],"carrier":"AusPost"}}
</tool_call>
That missed SKU-8 and insured value. Return only the fixed tool call.

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_return_label","arguments":{"order_id":"ORD-990","items":["SKU-1","SKU-8"],"carrier":"AusPost","insured_value_cents":18900}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"flag_content_review","description":"Flag content review.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"content_id":{"type":"string"},"reasons":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"priority":{"type":"string"},"reviewer_pool":{"type":"string"}},"required":["content_id","reasons","priority","reviewer_pool"]}}}]</tools>
Flag content POST-602 for reasons spam and impersonation, high priority, reviewer pool trust_safety.

<tool_call>
{"name":"flag_content_review","arguments":{"content_id":"POST-602","reasons":["spam"]}}
</tool_call>
Correct it with both reasons, priority, and reviewer_pool. Only the tool call.

<tool_call>
{"name":"flag_content_review","arguments":{"content_id":"POST-602","reasons":["spam","impersonation"],"priority":"high","reviewer_pool":"trust_safety"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"grant_partner_access","description":"Grant partner access.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"partner_id":{"type":"string"},"systems":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"expires_on":{"type":"string"},"access_level":{"type":"string"}},"required":["partner_id","systems","expires_on","access_level"]}}}]</tools>
Grant partner PTNR-14 read_only access to portal and analytics until 2026-09-01.

<tool_call>
{"name":"grant_partner_access","arguments":{"partner_id":"PTNR-14","systems":["portal"]}}
</tool_call>
That left out analytics, expiry, and access level. Re-issue only the corrected call.

<tool_call>
{"name":"grant_partner_access","arguments":{"partner_id":"PTNR-14","systems":["portal","analytics"],"expires_on":"2026-09-01","access_level":"read_only"}}
</tool_call>
